subcodes.first_line: Manifest, resplendent and radiant! Blessed be thy tongue, wherewith thou hast made mention of the Best-Beloved of the worlds and given voice to the raptures of them that are drawn unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ظاهر و لائح و مشرق طوبی للسانک بما ذکرت به محبوب العالمین و نطقت بربوات المجتذبین
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @unity; oneness of humanity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @work as worship, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @fairmindedness; personal justice [insaf]
